headline: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Southern, Raises Price Target to $112
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Shelby Tucker   maintains Southern (NYSE:SO) with a Buy and raises the price target from $108 to $112.

headline: Is Southern (SO) Still Attractively Priced After Strong Multi Year Share Gains?
summary: If you are wondering whether Southern's current share price still makes sense, you are not alone. This is especially true with many investors now paying closer attention to what they are getting for every dollar they put in. Southern's stock last closed at US$97.20, with returns of 0.9% over 7 days, 7.8% over 30 days, 11.5% year to date, 13.2% over 1 year, 67.5% over 3 years and 97.6% over 5 years. This naturally raises questions about how the recent performance lines up with underlying...

headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Southern (SO) Analyst Upgrades And A Key Leadership Appointment
summary: In recent days, Southern has drawn increased attention as Mississippi Power appointed Fredie Carmichael vice president of Customer Solutions and Corporate Communications, while several major research firms upgraded Southern’s rating. Together, these developments highlight growing external confidence in Southern’s ability to manage customer growth, communications, and evolving energy needs across its multi-state footprint. We’ll now examine how this wave of analyst upgrades, reflecting...
